capabilities_used.evidence: 图表里最明确的一张就是标准杯柄形态：白色U形杯体+右侧小柄，目标位直接上投到 120,000；对应推文 [2024-06-16] “#BTC: TARGET IS $120‘000!”。
图 #7 显示一串抬高低点持续挤压 1.70 一线水平阻力，红圈标注顶部突破位；他在推文中高频使用同类语言：“ETHEREUM BREAKOUT ATTEMPT!!”“ETHEREUM DAILY BREAK!”“BITCOIN HOURLY W-BREAK!”。
[2025-09-22] “ETHEREUM DUMPED BELOW EMA ON 1D! Last time this happens $ETH pumped 132% in 2 months!” 说明他把关键 EMA 的跌破/收复当成趋势切换和加仓依据。
[2024-04-19] “#BITCOIN HALVING: URGENT MESSAGE!!!!!!!!!” [2024-01-28] “#Bitcoin halving in less then 3 months!” [2024-12-30] “BTC Bullrun Q1 2025!”；他明显把减半后的时间窗口当作主框架。
[2024-04-30] “#Bitcoin Bull market is over when funding fees reach 1% a day. We reached 0.33% at the high. Now we at 0.03%. We are far from the bull market top!” 他明确用资金费极值判断顶部远近。
[2024-06-16] “#BTC: PROOF THAT BLACKROCK ENTERED!” 显示他会把机构/ETF 资金进入作为上涨确认叙事。
[2026-04-07] “LAST SHAKE OUT BEFORE BULL!” [2025-07-29] “HAVE YOU BEEN SHAKEN OUT YET?” 这类表述反复出现，说明他常把下杀洗盘视作扫流动性后继续上行。
[2024-08-30] “Crypto became boring! I am SO BORED right now!!!! But it’s a good thing. Calm before the storm” 说明他会识别低波动盘整阶段，并把盘整理解为大波动前奏。

整体发言高度偏向趋势延续和牛市主升段，例如 [2024-10-29] “Bitcoin Bears: GAME OVER!” [2024-08-28] “The moment Bitcoin breaks $70‘000 it’s GAME OVER for Bears!” [2025-05-28] “Bitcoin is above $100’000 since 20 days! This has NEVER happened before!”。
[2024-07-29] “A monthly close above $70‘000 will kick off the last phase of the parabolic Bull Market!” 说明他不只是看涨，也会把抛物线末段当成特定阶段来定义。
他常在强趋势里等待回踩再继续，例如 [2025-09-22] 用 1D EMA 跌破后的修复类比后续拉升；[2025-01-31] “We need to hold above $3’270 to stay golden. A break below would invalidate the break.” 体现回踩确认后延续的思路。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Compression Breakout
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Repeatedly identifies tight coiling, boring ranges, or multi-candle compression below resistance and trades the expansion once price breaks the box/ceiling.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 反复识别“盘整收缩/挤压/无聊行情”后接方向性放量突破的 setup，核心不是标准三角或旗形，而是泛化的 box/coil 压缩突破。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-01-31] “ETHEREUM IS COILING UP!!!! BIG TIMES!!!!!” [2024-10-29] “Bitcoin is coiling up like it has never been coiling up before!” [2024-08-30] “Calm before the storm” [2024-08-23] “Bitcoin will break within 7 days!”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Weekday Pump Seasonality
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses recurring weekday effects, especially Monday strength, as a lightweight timing overlay for bullish continuation calls.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把工作日季节性，尤其“周一上涨效应”，当作轻量择时因子叠加到趋势看多框架上。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-05-27] “Monday is Pump Day!” [2025-05-26] “Monday Bitcoin Pumps are the FREAKING BEST IN THE WORLD!!!!”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Public PnL Conviction Signaling
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 公开盈亏截图强化信念
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Publishes account screenshots, unrealized/realized PnL, and size disclosures to reinforce trade conviction, social proof, and audience adherence to his directional call.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 通过公开账户截图、未实现/已实现利润和仓位规模，强化自己的方向判断与受众跟随度；这是他的内容化交易框架的一部分。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图 #1 为 SOL 11x 多单巨额浮盈截图；图 #8 为 ETH 现货大额持仓；[2024-11-30] “People were LAUGHING at my months/year long position trades...” [2025-04-22] “$8.6 MILLION UNREALIZED $8.9 MILLION REALIZED”

personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把周一当作偏多的情绪/季节性触发器。

personal_quirks.quote: Crypto became boring! I am SO BORED right now!!!! But it’s a good thing. Calm before the storm ⛈️ 🚀
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 低波动、无聊盘整不是坏事，往往预示后续大行情。

personal_quirks.quote: People were LAUGHING at my months/year long position trades. I have proven to the world it is the least risky & most profitable way of trading.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 偏好长期持仓式方向交易，而不是频繁短打；把长持仓定义为更低风险高收益。

personal_quirks.quote: The moment Bitcoin breaks $70‘000 it’s GAME OVER for Bears!
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 关键水平一旦突破，就迅速切换到高确信度趋势延续叙事。
把剧烈回撤优先解释成洗盘/扫流动性，而非趋势终结。

unique_traits: 他不是纯粹的冷静量化型 TA，而是把经典形态、周期叙事和高情绪动员式内容包装合在一起。图表上最常见的是杯柄、压缩后突破、关键均线与关键价位确认；表达上则大量使用“GAME OVER”“IMMINENT”“COILING UP”这种高确信度口号。另一个明显特征是公开展示大额仓位和盈利截图，把交易分析和个人品牌/群体信念绑定在一起。
